_evasion.description: Attacker uses character substitution and string concatenation to obfuscate the -ExecutionPolicy Bypass flag, attempting to evade detection rules that look for literal strings.
_evasion.bypass_attempt: Obfuscating -ExecutionPolicy Bypass using concatenation: 'set-executionpolicy' via IEX
_evasion.notes: This is a KNOWN GAP. Our current rule uses literal string matching (*-ExecutionPolicy*Bypass*). Obfuscated variants using Set-ExecutionPolicy or environment variable concatenation will bypass this rule. Mitigation: Enable PowerShell ScriptBlock logging (EID 4104) which captures the deobfuscated command.
_evasion.remediation: Add EID 4104 ScriptBlock detection for Set-ExecutionPolicy calls as a companion rule
